About Plumb Doctor

12+ years serving Indianapolis and surrounding areas

Plumb Doctor started with a simple mission: to provide honest, reliable plumbing services to our neighbors in Indianapolis. We're not just fixing pipes, we're building relationships based on trust and quality workmanship.

We approach every job, big or small, with the same dedication to excellence. Our team uses proven techniques and quality materials to ensure lasting solutions. We explain the problem clearly and offer transparent pricing, so you're always in the know.

We're proud to serve the Indianapolis community. We support local schools and charities, and we're committed to providing fair and ethical service to every homeowner. We're your neighbors, and we treat you like family.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Plumb Doctor

Trusted plumbing company professionals serving Indianapolis, IN and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
